shulker_pocket.name: Shulker Pocket
shulker_pocket.config.title: Shulker Pocket
shulker_pocket.config.invert_scroll.tool: Flip which scroll direction advances the cursor.
shulker_pocket.config.cooldown.tooltip: Minimum time between swaps. Lower is faster but easier to overshoot.
shulker_pocket.config.bare_hands_stop.to: Include an empty 'bare hands' stop when cycling past the last item.
shulker_pocket.config.play_sounds.toolti: Play subtle swap and deny sounds.
shulker_pocket.config.activation.tooltip: Hold Sneak, or a key you bind in Controls, while scrolling. Rebind under Options → Controls → Inventory.
